summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of revamped Analytics page with 3 tabs (Overview, Campaigns, Agents) and AI recommendations completed. All 17 features tested and working correctly. Logs removed from sidebar.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for tab navigation and recommendation cards
AnimatePresence used correctly for smooth tab transitions
AI recommendations use type-coded colors: opportunity (green), warning (amber), optimization (purple), insight (blue)
Recharts AreaChart and BarChart render correctly for campaign and agent trends
Campaign and Agent pill selectors work with proper active state styling (bg-cyan)
Expand/collapse animation on recommendation cards works smoothly with framer-motion
seed_data_creation: Mock data defined in Analytics.tsx: AI_RECOMMENDATIONS (6 items), CAMPAIGN_TREND_DATA, AGENT_TREND_DATA. Agent data from useAgentStore, Campaign data from usePhaseData hook.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics page revamp complete with 3 tabs. All data is MOCKED within page components. Logs page removed from sidebar and routes. Previous iterations tested Tools, Reports, Logs pages - all passed.

analytics_3_tab_navigation.details: Overview, Campaigns, Agents tabs visible with data-testid attributes

overview_tab_default_active.details: Overview tab is active by default with bg-white styling

overview_kpis_visible.details: KPIs visible: Total Reach (4.6L), Total Spend (₹11.6L), Total Converted (21.5K), Avg Conv Rate (4.7%)

overview_cost_revenue_chart.details: Cost vs Revenue chart renders with Revenue and Spend lines

overview_ai_recommendations_panel.details: AI Recommendations panel shows 6 actionable insights

recommendation_expand_collapse.details: Clicking recommendation expands to show description, impact, confidence bar, and action button

campaigns_tab_pill_selector.details: 3 campaign pills visible: High-LTV Re-engagement, KYC Completion Drive, Festival Cashback Promo

campaigns_5_kpi_cards.details: 5 KPI cards: Total Sent, Conversions, Revenue, Spend, ROI

campaigns_daily_performance_trend.details: Daily Performance Trend AreaChart renders correctly

campaigns_channel_breakdown.details: Channel Breakdown grid shows WhatsApp, AI Voice with metrics

agents_tab_pill_selector.details: 3 agent pills visible: Sales Outreach Agent, Customer Support Agent, Appointment Scheduler

agents_5_kpi_cards.details: 5 KPI cards: Total Calls, Success Rate, Failed Calls, Avg Duration, Avg Latency

agents_configuration_summary.details: Agent Configuration row shows Model, Voice, Use Case, Version

agents_daily_call_volume_chart.details: Daily Call Volume & Success BarChart renders correctly

agents_3_quick_links.details: 3 quick-link cards: View Full Evaluation, Failure Analysis, Prompt Enhancement

sidebar_logs_removed.details: Logs item removed from PERFORMANCE section in sidebar

logs_route_removed.details: /logs route shows blank page - route removed from routes.tsx

tab_switching_animation.details: Switching between campaigns/agents updates view with smooth animation

mocked_data_note: ALL analytics data is MOCKED: AI_RECOMMENDATIONS array (6 items), CAMPAIGN_TREND_DATA, AGENT_TREND_DATA in Analytics.tsx. Agent data from agentStore mock, Campaign data from usePhaseData hook mock.
